message:
fix(dashboard): use Firecracker UDS for vsock connection

Replace AF_VSOCK (vsock.Dial) with Firecracker's Unix Domain Socket
approach. Firecracker exposes vsock to the host via a UDS file where
the host must:
1. Connect to the UDS path
2. Send "CONNECT <port>\n"
3. Receive "OK <port>\n"
4. Then communicate transparently with the guest

This is the correct way to connect to Firecracker VMs from the host.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
